subcodes.first_line: O true friend of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Through diligence and service, goodly conduct and steadfastness, and excellence of wisdom, remain thou firm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست حقیقی عبدالبهاء بهمت و خدمت و حسن سلوک و استقامت و حسن سیاست ثابت و
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @service to others; to the Cause of God
